since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +6.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.11% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +6.55%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +6.55%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +10.14%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +10.14%, WDAY +9.21%, SNOW +8.94%, DV +8.64%, DDOG +8.40%. Laggards: TER -8.36%, NXPI -8.15%, QCOM -7.84%, MU -7.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.52% at $152.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: DV moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: DV is +8.64% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
